sentences.text: The Zicond extension defines two R-type instructions that support branchless conditional operations.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0

sentences.text: | |RV32 |RV64 |Mnemonic |Instruction
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0

sentences.text: |{check} |{check} |czero.eqz rd, rs1, rs2 |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0

sentences.text: |{check} |{check} |czero.nez rd, rs1, rs2 |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0

sentences.text: [insns-czero-eqz,reftext="Conditional zero, if condition is equal to zero"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order)

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Moves zero to a register rd, if the condition rs2 is equal to zero, otherwise moves rs1 to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: czero.eqz rd, rs1, rs2
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: Encoding:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ { bits: 7, name: 0x33, attr: ['OP'] }, { bits: 5, name: 'rd' }, { bits: 3, name: 0x5, attr: ['CZERO.EQZ']}, { bits: 5, name: 'rs1', attr: ['value'] }, { bits: 5, name: 'rs2', attr: ['condition'] }, { bits: 7, name: 0x7, attr: ['CZERO'] }, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: If rs2 contains the value zero, this instruction writes the value zero to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: Otherwise, this instruction copies the contents of rs1 to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: This instruction carries a syntactic dependency from both rs1 and rs2 to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: Furthermore, if the Zkt extension is implemented, this instruction's timing is independent of the data values in rs1 and rs2.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: SAIL code:: [source,sail] -- let condition = X(rs2); result : xlenbits = if (condition zeros()) then zeros() else X(rs1); X(rd) = result; --
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: [insns-czero-nez,reftext="Conditional zero, if condition is nonzero"]
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Moves zero to a register rd, if the condition rs2 is nonzero, otherwise moves rs1 to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: czero.nez rd, rs1, rs2
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: Encoding:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ { bits: 7, name: 0x33, attr: ['OP'] }, { bits: 5, name: 'rd' }, { bits: 3, name: 0x7, attr: ['CZERO.NEZ']}, { bits: 5, name: 'rs1', attr: ['value'] }, { bits: 5, name: 'rs2', attr: ['condition'] }, { bits: 7, name: 0x7, attr: ['CZERO'] }, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: If rs2 contains a nonzero value, this instruction writes the value zero to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: Otherwise, this instruction copies the contents of rs1 to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: This instruction carries a syntactic dependency from both rs1 and rs2 to rd.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: Furthermore, if the Zkt extension is implemented, this instruction's timing is independent of the data values in rs1 and rs2.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: SAIL code:: [source,sail] -- let condition = X(rs2); result : xlenbits = if (condition != zeros()) then zeros() else X(rs1); X(rd) = result; --
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > czero.eqz > czero.nez

sentences.text: The instructions from this extension can be used to construct sequences that perform conditional-arithmetic, conditional-bitwise-logical, and conditional-select operations.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples

sentences.text: | |Operation |Instruction sequence |Length
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional add, if zero* + `rd = (rc 0) ? (rs1 + rs2) : rs1` |czero.nez rd, rs2, rc add rd, rs1, rd .8+.^|2 insns
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional add, if non-zero* + `rd = (rc != 0) ? (rs1 + rs2) : rs1` |czero.eqz rd, rs2, rc add rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional subtract, if zero* + `rd = (rc 0) ? (rs1 - rs2) : rs1` |czero.nez rd, rs2, rc sub rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional subtract, if non-zero* + `rd = (rc != 0) ? (rs1 - rs2) : rs1` |czero.eqz rd, rs2, rc sub rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional bitwise-or, if zero* + `rd = (rc 0) ? (rs1 \| rs2) : rs1` |czero.nez rd, rs2, rc or rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional bitwise-or, if non-zero* + `rd = (rc != 0) ? (rs1 \| rs2) : rs1` |czero.eqz rd, rs2, rc or rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional bitwise-xor, if zero* + `rd = (rc 0) ? (rs1 ^ rs2) : rs1` |czero.nez rd, rs2, rc xor rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional bitwise-xor, if non-zero* + `rd = (rc != 0) ? (rs1 ^ rs2) : rs1` |czero.eqz rd, rs2, rc xor rd, rs1, rd
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional bitwise-and, if zero* + `rd = (rc 0) ? (rs1 & rs2) : rs1` |and rd, rs1, rs2 czero.eqz rtmp, rs1, rc or rd, rd, rtmp .4+.^|3 insns + (requires 1 temporary)
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional bitwise-and, if non-zero* + `rd = (rc != 0) ? (rs1 & rs2) : rs1` |and rd, rs1, rs2 czero.nez rtmp, rs1, rc or rd, rd, rtmp
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional select, if zero* + `rd = (rc 0) ? rs1 : rs2` |czero.nez rd, rs1, rc czero.eqz rtmp, rs2, rc add rd, rd, rtmp
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences

sentences.text: |*Conditional select, if non-zero* + `rd = (rc != 0) ? rs1 : rs2` |czero.eqz rd, rs1, rc czero.nez rtmp, rs2, rc add rd, rd, rtmp
sentences.section: Preamble > "Zicond" Extension for Integer Conditional Operations, Version 1.0.0 > Instructions (in alphabetical order) > Usage examples > Instruction sequences
